title: PublicSectorAgency
description: A government agency / bureau / commission / program at federal, state, county, or municipal level. Aligns with schema.org/GovernmentOrganization and with the Open Civic Data jurisdiction model. Identifiers favour stable URIs published by the agency itself (api.data.gov gateway URL, agency homepage, OCD-ID for political geography) over locally minted IDs.

id.description: Stable identifier for the agency. Prefer an Open Civic Data Division Identifier (ocd-division/country:us/state:ca) for elected/jurisdictional bodies; otherwise the agency's canonical homepage URL or its api.data.gov gateway URL.

name.description: Official name of the agency (e.g. 'General Services Administration', 'Federal Election Commission', 'City of Chicago Department of Innovation and Technology').

alternateNames.description: Other commonly used names or historical names.

level.description: Government level. 'federal' = U.S. national; 'state' = U.S. state or D.C.; 'tribal' = federally recognized tribal government; 'special-district' = single-purpose government (school, water, transit).

jurisdiction.description: The political geography this agency governs. Uses Open Civic Data Division Identifiers where applicable.

state.description: USPS two-letter state code for U.S. agencies.

parentAgency.description: ID or URL of the parent agency (e.g. Internal Revenue Service -> Department of the Treasury).

mission.description: Statutory mission statement or one-paragraph description.

developerPortalUrl.description: Developer / API portal URL if one exists.

dataPortalUrl.description: Open-data portal URL (data.gov organization page, Socrata domain, CKAN catalog).

foiaUrl.description: Freedom of Information Act / FOIA request portal.

apis.description: Public-facing programmatic surfaces the agency exposes.

statutoryAuthority.description: Statutes establishing the agency or its data-publication obligation (e.g. 'Open Government Data Act of 2018', 'DATA Act of 2014', 'Foundations for Evidence-Based Policymaking Act of 2018').
